summary: Completed testing of Phase 1 features: Auto-thumbnail generation (400x400 JPEG) and Dual pricing (Resident R / Visitor V). All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI components working correctly - admin menu shows R/V pricing, modal has 3 price fields, public menu shows only resident price in GBP format.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: Admin login with admin@jollys.com / Admin123!
Backend: Response includes both image_url and thumbnail_url fields
Backend: MenuItemUpdate accepts visitor_price for updates
Backend: PUT /api/admin/menu-items/{id} with visitor_price updates correctly
Backend: GET /api/admin/menu-items returns visitor_price in response
Backend: visitor_price is optional (can be null)
Frontend: Admin menu table shows 'PRICING (R/V)' column header
Frontend: Items with visitor_price show both R and V labels (e.g., R £13.99, V £16.99)
Frontend: Items without visitor_price show only R label
Frontend: Add/Edit modal has 3 price fields: Resident Price (R), Visitor Price (V), Original Price
Frontend: Edit modal populates existing visitor_price correctly
Frontend: Public menu catalog at /menu-catalog shows only resident price
Frontend: Public menu uses GBP (£) currency format
Frontend: No visitor price visible on public menu (correct behavior)
seed_data_creation: Item 19 (Avocado Toast at oakmere-handforth) has visitor_price=16.99 set for testing dual pricing display
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features fully implemented and tested: (1) Auto-thumbnail generation creates 400x400 JPEG thumbnails in /app/backend/uploads/thumbnails/ when images are uploaded via POST /api/admin/menu-items/{id}/upload-image. (2) Dual pricing with visitor_price field - admin sees both R (resident) and V (visitor) prices, public menu shows only resident price. Item 19 at oakmere-handforth has visitor_price=16.99 for testing. All backend endpoints working, frontend components displaying correctly.
